title: Host Twists
entries: NPC really doesn’t like someone else in the party
NPC really likes someone in party too much
NPC Might tell your enemies
NPC Is actually not helpful
An adversary learns about you and your location and acts upon it
A local mob threatens the NPC to not help [PC]/ Party
Another NPC you know needs your help, urgently
You are mistaken for someone else, who's in big trouble
The NPC severly insults and taunts one of your party members.
The NPC gets a crush on [PC] or on one of the party
NPC has a hidden agenda and tries to manipulate [PC]/Party for their own gain
NPC mistakenly gives you wrong or misleading information
NPC is secretly related to [PC] or a party member, bringing up old familial issues
NPC tries to rob or scam [PC]/Party when the opportunity arises
NPC suddenly disappears after an interaction, leaving a mystery behind
NPC has a curse or affliction they might inadvertently pass to [PC]/Party
NPC's assistance comes with an unexpected high price or sacrifice
NPC tries to create division within the party to serve their own ends
A bounty hunter approaches during your interaction, looking for the NPC
NPC warns [PC] of another NPC or location that's not what it seems
NPC is haunted by a ghost or entity that now starts haunting [PC]/Party
NPC asks [PC]/Party to keep a dangerous secret, putting them at risk
NPC reveals they've seen or experienced visions of [PC]'s future
NPC unintentionally brings attention or fame to [PC]/Party, not all of it good
An item or possession of the NPC is coveted by dangerous entities, and now by association, [PC]/Party is a target
NPC is part of a forbidden or secretive society and tries to recruit [PC]/Party
The NPC is dying and their final wish or message dramatically alters the party's quest
NPC was a past rival or enemy in disguise, testing [PC]/Party
NPC's interaction triggers an old prophecy or legend involving [PC]/Party
NPC is bound by a magical oath and cannot fully assist or reveal everything to [PC]/Party
